case_title: ALLAN SCHWARTZ, ESQ. VS. JEFFREY SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ESQ., ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JEFFREY SMITH, SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ESQ., ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, JEFFREY SMITH, SUZANNE $1,230.00 PRINCIPAL, $5.48 INTEREST, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,510.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JEFFREY HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: FEB-12-2012 AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JEFFREY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-15-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF TO EXPLAIN STATUS OF CASE AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS SC-220 FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, JEFFREY SMITH, SUZANNE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR.
